name: Asus VG259QM (IPS Panel, Res: 1920X1080, 280Hz, 1ms GTG, G-Sync)
highlights: 5-inch Full HD gaming monitor designed for competitive gamers and immersive gameplay
Featuring a blazing-fast 280Hz refresh rate, 1ms (GTG) response time, and ASUS Fast IPS technology, it ensures ultra-smooth visuals with vibrant color accuracy
The monitor supports HDR10, ELMB Sync, and both G-SYNC Compatible and AMD FreeSync Premium for tear-free gaming
